content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.ai_gateway
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/ai_gateway.py (108 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Universal AI Gateway.

"If it thinks, I can link to it!"

This module allows cosmos to connect to ANY external AI/LLM API.
It normalizes inputs/outputs so the swarm can use Google AI Labs, Grok, OpenAI, etc.
transparently alongside local models.

CLASSES:
- APIEndpoint
- UniversalAIBackend(LLMBackend): A backend adapter that treats external APIs as just another swarm member.
  Methods: def backend_type(self) -> BackendType
  Methods: async def load(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def unload(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> GenerationResult
  Methods: async def generate_stream(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> AsyncIterat
  Methods: async def get_embedding(self, text: str) -> list[float]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_grok_backend(api_key: str) -> UniversalAIBackend
- def create_google_backend(api_key: str) -> UniversalAIBackend
